PtolemyIIAccessorDetails How Ptolemy II imports an Accessor When the user imports an accessor into Ptolemy II, the ptolemy.vergil.basic.imprt.accessor.ImportAccessorAction class uses an XSLT transformation program to convert an accessor specificatio

mation program to convert an accessor specification into a Ptolemy II actor. The XSLT script can be found in the Ptolemy II source code tree at $PTII/org/terraswarm/kernel/XMLJStoMOML.xslt . The Ptolemy II actor uses as its base class the org.terrasw

my II actor uses as its base class the org.terraswarm.accessor.jjs.JSAccessor , which is derived from ptolemy.actor.lib.jjs.JavaScript , a generic JavaScript interpreter actor in Ptolemy II. Test a Ptolemy Accessor Import See Test A Ptolemy Accessor
